shot.composition: Close-up of hands setting up a shop on the Takلفة app.
shot.camera_motion: Fast zoom to show the ease of the app.

subject.description: A business owner showing on the screen to upload products with simple steps.
subject.wardrobe: Casual clothing that reflects day to day life

scene.environment: Business is open, you can hear people outside and the regular sounds of a local shop

visual_details: action 1: Use the Takلفة app and take a picture of the product
action 3: Start receiving immediate orders and start making money!

talk: Voice Over: Takلفة: صور، حدد السعر وابدأ البيع

audio.lyrics: Trending song about selling products fast

shot.composition: owner looking at competitor, shaking his head. The owner then turns around opens up the Takلفة app and starts smiling.
shot.camera_motion: Panning to show the difference emotions after switching to Takلفة.

scene.environment: Normal sound of every day business

visual_details: action 1: The user is shaking his head looking to competition
action 2: The phone displays the Takلفة Logo
action 3: Start smiling knowing sales will increase

talk: Shop Owner: شكرا تكلفة, الان راح تزيد ارباحي

shot.composition: Various clips that show different clips of different local Saudi shops.
shot.camera_motion: Fast transition between different cut scenes.

subject.description: Showing how various stores are successful because of Takلفة.

visual_details: action 1: Display how many customers are in the store
action 2: Show the shop owner checking his phone with the Takلفة app
action 3: Quick show of different success stories.

talk: Voice Over: كل المحلات التجارية تستخدم تكلفة و تزيد ارباحها

prohibited_elements: Do not display any logos to competitors

shot.composition: A customer is looking for a product, and finds the shop through the Takلفة App.
shot.camera_motion: Focus on the customer and shops displaying on the map.

subject.description: Saudi Customer looking up shops in his area.

scene.environment: Normal sound coming from inside a car

visual_details: action 1: Looking up a shop for a quick stop.
action 2: Sees the local stores using the app.
action 3: Chooses the closest store and goes to shop.

cinematography.lighting: Light from the inside of the car

talk: Customer: واخيرا لقيت محل قريب مني. شكرا لبرنامج تكلفة
